'''鈭歷-f-t''' ('''kavafat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flame|flame]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flame|flame]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-f-t
|-
! Lemma
| kavafat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivafat|thivafat]] || [[word:jivafat|jivafat]] || [[word:shivafat|shivafat]] || [[word:kivafat|kivafat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvafat|thuthuvafat]] || [[word:jujuvafat|jujuvafat]] || [[word:shushuvafat|shushuvafat]] || [[word:kukuvafat|kukuvafat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvafat|thuvafat]] || [[word:juvafat|juvafat]] || [[word:shuvafat|shuvafat]] || [[word:kuvafat|kuvafat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvafat|thuvafat]] || [[word:juvafat|juvafat]] || [[word:shuvafat|shuvafat]] || [[word:kuvafat|kuvafat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevafat|thevafat]] || [[word:jevafat|jevafat]] || [[word:shevafat|shevafat]] || [[word:kevafat|kevafat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovafat|thothovafat]] || [[word:jojovafat|jojovafat]] || [[word:shoshovafat|shoshovafat]] || [[word:kokovafat|kokovafat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovafat|thovafat]] || [[word:jovafat|jovafat]] || [[word:shovafat|shovafat]] || [[word:kovafat|kovafat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovafat|thovafat]] || [[word:jovafat|jovafat]] || [[word:shovafat|shovafat]] || [[word:kovafat|kovafat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vafat|th忙vafat]] || [[word:j忙vafat|j忙vafat]] || [[word:sh忙vafat|sh忙vafat]] || [[word:k忙vafat|k忙vafat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavafat|thathavafat]] || [[word:jajavafat|jajavafat]] || [[word:shashavafat|shashavafat]] || [[word:kakavafat|kakavafat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavafat|thavafat]] || [[word:javafat|javafat]] || [[word:shavafat|shavafat]] || [[word:kavafat|kavafat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavafat|thavafat]] || [[word:javafat|javafat]] || [[word:shavafat|shavafat]] || [[word:kavafat|kavafat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavafat|shavafat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavafat|goshavafat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavafat|gokishavafat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavafatn眉|shavafatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavafatnkn眉|goshavafatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafatn眉|gokishavafatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavafatsh毛|shavafatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavafatnksh毛|goshavafatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavafatsh毛|gokishavafatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafatro|shavafatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafatnkro|goshavafatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafatro|gokishavafatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafatmu|shavafatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafatnkmu|goshavafatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafatmu|gokishavafatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavafatsher|shavafatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavafatnksher|goshavafatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavafatsher|gokishavafatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavafatng|shavafatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavafatnkng|goshavafatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavafatng|gokishavafatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavafatya|shavafatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavafatnkya|goshavafatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavafatya|gokishavafatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavafatyam|shavafatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavafatnkyam|goshavafatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavafatyam|gokishavafatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafatn眉sh毛|shavafatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafatnkn眉sh毛|goshavafatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafatn眉sh毛|gokishavafatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafatn眉ro|shavafatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafatnkn眉ro|goshavafatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafatn眉ro|gokishavafatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafatn眉mu|shavafatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafatnkn眉mu|goshavafatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafatn眉mu|gokishavafatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafatsh毛n眉|shavafatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafatnksh毛n眉|goshavafatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafatsh毛n眉|gokishavafatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafatsh毛ro|shavafatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafatnksh毛ro|goshavafatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafatsh毛ro|gokishavafatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafatsh毛mu|shavafatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafatnksh毛mu|goshavafatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafatsh毛mu|gokishavafatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafatron眉|shavafatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafatnkron眉|goshavafatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafatron眉|gokishavafatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafatrosh毛|shavafatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafatnkrosh毛|goshavafatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafatrosh毛|gokishavafatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafatromu|shavafatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafatnkromu|goshavafatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafatromu|gokishavafatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafatmun眉|shavafatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafatnkmun眉|goshavafatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafatmun眉|gokishavafatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafatmush毛|shavafatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafatnkmush毛|goshavafatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafatmush毛|gokishavafatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafatmuro|shavafatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafatnkmuro|goshavafatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafatmuro|gokishavafatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
